discord_bot.how_to_communicate: How to communicate with buyers through Discord
discord_bot.how_to_communicate_answer:
Add the official [SC Market Discord Bot](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=868709691469987860&permissions=361314126849&integration_type=0&scope=bot) to your server and you can register a channel to automatically create threads between sellers and buyers when an order is placed. Buyers will automatically be invited to your server where you can work with them to fulfill the order.

1. Add [the Bot](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=868709691469987860&permissions=361314126849&integration_type=0&scope=bot) to your server

2. Run `/register Server` targeting either an individual user or an org contractor. For example, to have orders associated with you as an individual, run `/register Server User`. To register on behalf of an org `/register Server Contractor ORGNAME`. After doing so, users will automatically be invited to your server when placing an order.

3. Run `/register Channel` targeting either an individual user or an org contractor. For example, to have orders associated with you as an individual, run `/register Channel User`. To register on behalf of an org `/register Channel Contractor ORGNAME`. After doing so, users will automatically be added to threads with the person assigned to their orders.
discord_bot.how_to_get_notified: How to get notified when an order is placed
discord_bot.how_to_get_notified_answer: Add the official [SC Market Discord Bot](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=868709691469987860&permissions=361314126849&integration_type=0&scope=bot) to your server to automatically receive direct messages when an order is placed with you or assigned to you. Alternatively, use the below configuration to fulfill orders through [SC Market's Official Server]({{DISCORD_INVITE}}).

landing.buySellItemsText: List your items to be sold in whatever quantity you support. Get alerts in Discord when someone places an order, and work with buyers to fulfill their orders. We don't take a cut.
landing.faqFeeA: No we do not. All services are provided here free of charge and no aUEC passes through us.
landing.faqFeeQ: Does SC Market take a fee?
landing.faqListThingsA: You can list any item or service as long as you accept aUEC in exchange for it. Items and services should generally be related to Star Citizen and services may be conducted in our out of the game itself.
landing.faqListThingsQ: What kinds of things can I list on SC Market?
landing.faqRealMoneyA: No. All transactions on SC Market should be completed in aUEC.
landing.faqRealMoneyQ: Can I list items for real money?
landing.faqSafeA: Because we don't handle any of the goods or aUEC ourselves, we cannot make any guarantees. However, we do provide ways for buyers and sellers to review each other, so you can be sure that others have had positive experiences with a seller if you are wary of being scammed.
landing.faqSafeQ: Is SC Market safe to use?
landing.faqSellItemsA: Create market listings for the items you want to sell. Buyers can add the items they want to their cart, then place an order with you for those items. From there it is up to you and the buyer to arrange a time and place to exchange the aUEC and goods.
landing.orderServicesText: Do you or your org have provide a service? Whether its medical rescue, hauler escort, sourcing items or otherwise, find a home on SC Market where you can discover the many services being provided throughout the 'verse.
landing.orgsHelpText: We enable orgs to coordinate their members to fulfill orders and render services. Become a trusted group customers come to when they need work done.
landing.subtitle: Buy and sell goods. Buy and sell services.
landing.supportersThanks: Thank you to all of our
landing.title: SC Market
landing.tradeInBulkText: Whether you have 5 FS-9s to sell or 50, we want to support you. List your items in bulk or individually and manage your stock with the click of a button.

listing.responsiveBadge: Responds to 90% of orders within 24 hours

orders.title: Orders

OrderSettings.allocationModeAutoDescription: Stock is automatically allocated when orders are created using FIFO (oldest stock first)
OrderSettings.allocationModeLabel: How should stock be allocated to orders?
OrderSettings.allocationModeManualDescription: You manually select which stock lots to allocate to each order
OrderSettings.allocationModeNoneDescription: No physical allocation - stock is tracked at listing level only
OrderSettings.allocationModeNote: Note: This setting controls how stock is physically allocated to orders. It is independent of the stock subtraction timing setting above, which controls when stock becomes visible to buyers.
OrderSettings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this setting?
OrderSettings.deleteError: Failed to delete setting. Please try again.
OrderSettings.description: Configure custom messages that will be automatically sent when offers are created or when offers turn into orders.
OrderSettings.limitsDescription: Set minimum and maximum limits for order sizes and values. Only applies when you are the seller.
OrderSettings.loadError: Failed to load settings. Please refresh the page.
OrderSettings.maxLessThanMin: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
OrderSettings.maxOrderSizeHelper: Maximum total quantity of items allowed
OrderSettings.messagesDescription: Configure automated messages sent with offers and orders.
OrderSettings.minOrderSizeHelper: Minimum total quantity of items required
OrderSettings.offerMessagePlaceholder: Enter a message to send when an offer is created...
OrderSettings.orderMessagePlaceholder: Enter a message to send when an offer becomes an order...
OrderSettings.orderSizeLimitsDescription: Set minimum and maximum order sizes (total quantity of items).
OrderSettings.orderValueLimitsDescription: Set minimum and maximum order values (in aUEC).
OrderSettings.requireAvailabilityDescription: When enabled, buyers must have their availability set before they can submit offers to you.
OrderSettings.requireAvailabilityLabel: Require buyers to set availability before submitting offers
OrderSettings.requirementsDescription: Configure requirements that must be met before orders can be placed.
OrderSettings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
OrderSettings.stockDescription: Configure when stock is subtracted from your inventory.
OrderSettings.stockSubtractionOnAccepted: Subtract stock when order is accepted (default)
OrderSettings.stockSubtractionOnReceived: Subtract stock when order is received
OrderSettings.stockSubtractionTimingDescription: Choose when stock is subtracted from your market listings. 'On accepted' (default) subtracts stock when the order status changes to 'in-progress'. 'On received' subtracts stock immediately when an order is created. 'Don't subtract' never subtracts stock automatically.
OrderSettings.stockSubtractionTimingLabel: When to subtract stock from market listings
OrderSettings.title: Order Messages

profile.accountAlreadyCitizenId: Your SC Market account ({{username}}) already has a Citizen iD linked. Please unlink it first before linking a new one.
profile.accountAlreadyDiscord: Your SC Market account already has Discord linked. Please unlink it first.
profile.accountLinksDescription: Manage your linked authentication accounts. You can link multiple accounts and choose which one to use for login.
profile.accountNotVerified: Your Citizen iD account must be verified before it can be linked. Please verify your account on Citizen iD and try again.
profile.citizenIdAlreadyLinked: This Citizen iD account is already linked to another SC Market account ({{username}}). Please unlink it first or use a different account.
profile.discordAlreadyLinked: This Discord account is already linked to another SC Market account ({{username}}). Please unlink it first.
profile.linkingError: An error occurred while linking your account: {{error}}
profile.reVerifyDescription: Update your profile username to match your current Spectrum handle. This will only update your username.
profile.reVerifyError: Failed to re-verify profile. Please try again later.
profile.reVerifySuccess: Profile successfully re-verified! Your username has been updated.
profile.unlinkDescription: Unlink your Star Citizen account to return to unverified status. Your username will be reset to the default format based on your Discord ID.
profile.unlinkDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to unlink your Star Citizen account? This will reset your profile to unverified status and change your username back to the default format. You can re-link your account at any time.
profile.unlinkError: Failed to unlink Star Citizen account. Please try again later.
profile.unlinkProviderDescription: Are you sure you want to unlink this account? You will no longer be able to log in using this method.
profile.unlinkSuccess: Star Citizen account successfully unlinked! Your profile has been reset to unverified status.
profile.verifyAccountDescription: You need to verify your account to access all features. Choose one of the following methods:

pushNotifications.androidPWARequired: Push notifications on Android require the app to be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA).
pushNotifications.browserNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in your browser.
pushNotifications.enabledOnDevice: Push notifications are enabled on this device
pushNotifications.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured. Please contact support.
pushNotifications.notEnabledOnDevice: Push notifications are not enabled on this device
pushNotifications.permissionDeniedError: Permission {{status}}. Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
pushNotifications.permissionDeniedMessage: Please enable notifications in your browser settings to use push notifications.
pushNotifications.permissionGrantedMessage: Permission granted! You can now subscribe to push notifications.
pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications

scmdb.connectPrompt: Generate a sync token to connect your SCMDB account. You'll get a URL to paste into SCMDB's Sync Sinks settings.
scmdb.description: Connect your SCMDB account to automatically sync blueprint ownership to SC Market. When you mark a blueprint as owned in SCMDB, it will be reflected here.
scmdb.disconnectWarning: SCMDB will no longer be able to sync blueprints to SC Market. Your current blueprint inventory will not be affected.
scmdb.ingestUrl: Paste this URL into SCMDB → Profile → Sync Sinks:
scmdb.noEvents: No events received yet. Add the URL to SCMDB to start syncing.
scmdb.regenerateWarning: This will invalidate your current URL. You'll need to update it in SCMDB.
scmdb.snapshotWarning: Connecting SCMDB with the snapshot event enabled will replace your current blueprint tracking on SC Market with SCMDB's data. Blueprints tracked only on SC Market will be marked as unowned.
scmdb.title: SCMDB Sync
